notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Victor Scott II.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Victor Scott II reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Sam Moll. José Fermín scores. Nelson Velázquez to 3rd. Victor Scott II to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Sam Moll.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Victor Scott II reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Sam Moll. José Fermín scores. Nelson Velázquez to 3rd. Victor Scott II to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Sam Moll.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Matt McLain. Nelson Velázquez scores. Victor Scott II to 3rd. JJ Wetherholt to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Matt McLain.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Matt McLain. Nelson Velázquez scores. Victor Scott II to 3rd. JJ Wetherholt to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Matt McLain.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
